name: continuity
label: continuity
summary: Continuity measures error of hard extrusions based on nearest neighbor coranking
description: Continuity measures error of hard extrusions based on nearest neighbor coranking

name: density_preservation
label: Density preservation
summary: Similarity between local densities in the high-dimensional data and the reduced data.
description: Similarity between local densities in the high-dimensional data and the reduced data.

name: distance_correlation
label: Distance correlation
summary: Spearman correlation between all pairwise Euclidean distances in the original and dimension-reduced data
description: Spearman correlation between all pairwise Euclidean distances in the original and dimension-reduced data

name: distance_correlation_spectral
label: Distance correlation (spectral)
summary: Spearman correlation between all pairwise diffusion distances in the original and dimension-reduced data
description: Spearman correlation between all pairwise diffusion distances in the original and dimension-reduced data

name: lcmc
label: local continuity meta criterion
summary: The local continuity meta criterion is the co-KNN size with baseline removal which favors locality
description: The local continuity meta criterion is the co-KNN size with baseline removal which favors locality

name: qglobal
label: global property
summary: The global property metric is a summary of the global co-KNN
description: The global property metric is a summary of the global co-KNN

name: qlocal
label: local property
summary: The local property metric is a summary of the local co-KNN
description: The local property metric is a summary of the local co-KNN

name: qnn
label: co-KNN size
summary: co-KNN size counts how many points are in both k-nearest neighbors before and after the dimensionality reduction
description: co-KNN size counts how many points are in both k-nearest neighbors before and after the dimensionality reduction

name: qnn_auc
label: co-KNN AUC
summary: co-KNN AUC is area under the co-KNN curve
description: co-KNN AUC is area under the co-KNN curve

name: trustworthiness
label: trustworthiness
summary: a measurement of similarity between the rank of each point's nearest neighbors in the high-dimensional data and the reduced data.
description: a measurement of similarity between the rank of each point's nearest neighbors in the high-dimensional data and the reduced data.
